title: West Bengal Postal Circle – Postal Assistant, Sorting Assistant – 85 Posts

basic_details.job_title: West Bengal Postal Circle Recruitment 2026 through LDCE - Apply Offline for 85 Postal Assistant, Sorting Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: West Bengal Postal Circle Recruitment 2026: 85 Postal Assistant, Sorting Assistant vacancies. Apply Offline from 11 May to 29 May 2026 at westbengalpost.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: IT-related terminology and modernisation of DoP
basic_details.post_name: Postal Assistant (Circle Office & Regional Offices), Postal Assistant (Post Office), Sorting Assistant (Railway Mail Service)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (Application in prescribed format Annexure-I through Divisional Office/Controlling Unit)

selection_process: Written Examination (Paper-I + DEST) as per revised LDCE pattern and syllabus (Annexure-II)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format (Annexure-I) through the Divisional Office/Controlling Unit. No direct or online applications are accepted. The APS candidates should send their applications to the concerned Divisions/Units only. Candidates must ensure they fulfill/satisfy all eligibility criteria and conditions before submitting the application.
